title: 管理增强会话终端设置与交互式会话访问控制
code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$ts   = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TerminalService

# ---- A. 读取主机增强会话终端设置 ----
$tssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TerminalServiceSettingData | Select-Object -First 1
$port = $tssd.ListenerPort            # 2179 (Hyper-V VMConnect / 增强会话端口)
$disableSSC = $tssd.DisableSelfSignedCertificateGeneration

# ---- B. ModifyServiceSettings(无害回环: 类属性只读，仅此方法可变更) ----
$r = $ts.ModifyServiceSettings($tssd.GetText(1))
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }   # rv 0=同步成功, 4096=作业

# ---- C. 对虚拟机授予/读取/撤销交互式会话 ACL ----
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = 'WMITEST_terminal_access'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$rd = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$rd.ResultingSystem

$trustee = "$env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME"   # 例如 HOST\Administrator

# 授予: (ComputerSystem REF = VM __PATH, Trustees = string[])
$rg = $ts.GrantInteractiveSessionAccess($vm.__PATH, @($trustee))
if ($rg.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rg.Job | Out-Null }

# 读取 ACL: OUT AccessControlList = string[]，每项为 <INSTANCE CLASSNAME=Msvm_InteractiveSessionACE> XML
$ra  = $ts.GetInteractiveSessionACL($vm.__PATH)
$acl = $ra.AccessControlList   # 每项含 AccessType (uint16, 0=Allow) 与 Trustee (string)

# 撤销
$rr = $ts.RevokeInteractiveSessionAccess($vm.__PATH, @($trustee))
if ($rr.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rr.Job | Out-Null }

# ---- 清理 ----
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null
output:
READ ListenerPort=2179 DisableSelfSignedCert=False
MODIFY rv=0 (sync ok)
READBACK ListenerPort=2179
VM_CREATED WMITEST_terminal_access
GRANT rv=0
GETACL rv=0 entries=1
GETACL sample=<INSTANCE CLASSNAME="Msvm_InteractiveSessionACE"><PROPERTY NAME="AccessType" TYPE="uint16"><VALUE>0</VALUE></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Trustee" TYPE="string"><VALUE>WIN-OMK556K17QL\Administrator</VALUE></PROPERTY></INSTANCE>
REVOKE rv=0
portOk=True grantOk=True aclOk=True revokeOk=True
ASSERT: PASS
CLEANUP destroyed WMITEST_terminal_access
CLEANUP verified no WMITEST_terminal_access remains
notes: Msvm_TerminalService 与 Msvm_TerminalServiceSettingData 均为主机单例，直接 Get-WmiObject -Class 即得该实例，无需按虚拟机过滤。SettingData 只读，其全部属性(ListenerPort/DisableSelfSignedCertificateGeneration/AuthCertificateHash/TrustedIssuerCertificateHashes/AllowedHashAlgorithms)只能经 ModifyServiceSettings 变更。
ModifyServiceSettings(ServiceSettingData: string) 以 SettingData.GetText(1) 序列化整份设置回传。本例做无害回环(原样回传)，rv=0 表示同步成功，回读 ListenerPort 仍为 2179。
GrantInteractiveSessionAccess / RevokeInteractiveSessionAccess 签名为 (ComputerSystem REF, Trustees string[], OUT Job)。ComputerSystem 传虚拟机的 __PATH；Trustees 传 'DOMAIN\User' 形式的字符串数组。rv=0 表示同步生效。
GetInteractiveSessionACL(ComputerSystem REF, OUT AccessControlList string[]) 返回每条 ACE 的 XML(Msvm_InteractiveSessionACE: AccessType uint16 0=Allow, Trustee string)。授予后 entries=1 含该 trustee，撤销后清空。
排障提示：若 vmms 服务处于 Stopped，root\virtualization\v2 下所有 provider 查询(VSMS/ImageMgmt/TerminalService/ComputerSystem)会返回 null 或 0 个实例(类定义仍在，故不报‘类不存在’)。此时应先确认并启动 vmms 服务。
本条目涉及的 4 个方法(Grant/Get/Revoke/ModifyServiceSettings)在同步路径下均返回 rv=0，无需轮询作业。
title_en: Managing Enhanced Session Terminal Settings and Interactive Session Access Control
notes_en: Both Msvm_TerminalService and Msvm_TerminalServiceSettingData are host singletons; a direct Get-WmiObject -Class returns that instance, with no need to filter per virtual machine. SettingData is read-only, and all of its properties (ListenerPort/DisableSelfSignedCertificateGeneration/AuthCertificateHash/TrustedIssuerCertificateHashes/AllowedHashAlgorithms) can only be changed through ModifyServiceSettings.

ModifyServiceSettings(ServiceSettingData: string) submits the entire setting data serialized via SettingData.GetText(1). This example performs a harmless round trip (submitting the data unchanged); rv=0 indicates synchronous success, and reading ListenerPort back still yields 2179.

GrantInteractiveSessionAccess / RevokeInteractiveSessionAccess have the signature (ComputerSystem REF, Trustees string[], OUT Job). ComputerSystem receives the virtual machine's __PATH; Trustees receives a string array in the 'DOMAIN\User' form. rv=0 indicates the change took effect synchronously.

GetInteractiveSessionACL(ComputerSystem REF, OUT AccessControlList string[]) returns the XML of each ACE (Msvm_InteractiveSessionACE: AccessType uint16 0=Allow, Trustee string). After granting, entries=1 contains that trustee; after revoking, the list is empty.

Troubleshooting note: if the vmms service is Stopped, all provider queries under root\virtualization\v2 (VSMS/ImageMgmt/TerminalService/ComputerSystem) return null or zero instances (the class definitions still exist, so no 'class not found' error is raised). In that case, first confirm and start the vmms service.
The four methods involved in this entry (Grant/Get/Revoke/ModifyServiceSettings) all return rv=0 on the synchronous path, with no need to poll the job.
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$ts   = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TerminalService

# ---- A. Read the host enhanced session terminal settings ----
$tssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_TerminalServiceSettingData | Select-Object -First 1
$port = $tssd.ListenerPort            # 2179 (Hyper-V VMConnect / enhanced session port)
$disableSSC = $tssd.DisableSelfSignedCertificateGeneration

# ---- B. ModifyServiceSettings (harmless round trip: class properties are read-only, only this method can change them) ----
$r = $ts.ModifyServiceSettings($tssd.GetText(1))
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }   # rv 0=synchronous success, 4096=job

# ---- C. Grant/read/revoke the interactive session ACL for a virtual machine ----
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = 'WMITEST_terminal_access'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$rd = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$rd.ResultingSystem

$trustee = "$env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME"   # e.g. HOST\Administrator

# Grant: (ComputerSystem REF = VM __PATH, Trustees = string[])
$rg = $ts.GrantInteractiveSessionAccess($vm.__PATH, @($trustee))
if ($rg.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rg.Job | Out-Null }

# Read the ACL: OUT AccessControlList = string[], each item is <INSTANCE CLASSNAME=Msvm_InteractiveSessionACE> XML
$ra  = $ts.GetInteractiveSessionACL($vm.__PATH)
$acl = $ra.AccessControlList   # each item contains AccessType (uint16, 0=Allow) and Trustee (string)

# Revoke
$rr = $ts.RevokeInteractiveSessionAccess($vm.__PATH, @($trustee))
if ($rr.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rr.Job | Out-Null }

# ---- Cleanup ----
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null
